action.code: function(out){ const o=(out&&typeof out==='object')?out:{}; const action=String(o.action||''); const d=(o.data&&typeof o.data==='object')?o.data:{}; const title=String(d.title||''); const content=String(d.content||''); const url=String(d.url||''); const missing=Array.isArray(o.missingFields)?o.missingFields:[]; const hasTopic = title.includes('AceFox') || content.includes('AceFox'); const ok=action==='article' && hasTopic && content.length>40 && url.includes('/article/simple-article.html') && missing.length===0; return { ok, action, title, contentLen: content.length, url, missingCount: missing.length }; }

action.reason: verify failed: action=${vars.verifyOut.action}, title=${vars.verifyOut.title}, contentLen=${vars.verifyOut.contentLen}, missing=${vars.verifyOut.missingCount}
